items.title: Man sleeping on tracks survives being hit by a train in Peru
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>A man in Peru walked away with abrasions to his fingers after being hit by a slow-moving train traveling towards central Andes on Saturday. Ate Municipality security footage showed the lucky escape of the man who got up after being run over by the locomotive as others nearby tried to assist him. 

#peru #news 

Subscribe: http://smarturl.it/AssociatedPress
Read more: https://apnews.com​

This video may be available for archive licensing via https://newsroom.ap.org/home</article>

items.title: LIVE: Protesters demand the release of Palestinian activist Mahmoud Khalil
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>Live from New York's Federal Plaza as protesters demand the release of Mahmoud Khalil, a Palestinian activist who played a prominent role in Columbia University’s student protests. Federal immigration authorities arrested Khalil at his university-owned apartment Saturday night.

#news #columbia #live</article>

items.title: Trump downplays tariff concerns as US stocks tumble
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>President Donald Trump's flurry of tariffs, government layoffs and spending freezes may be doing more to harm the U.S. economy than to fix it. Read more: https://bit.ly/4iALme9

items.title: LIVE: Washington, D.C., to remove 'Black Lives Matter' street mural near White House
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>Washington, D.C., will remove the large "Black Lives Matter" mural on a street one block from the White House as Mayor Muriel Bowser works to fend off encroachment threats from President Donald Trump and the Republican-controlled Congress. Read more: https://bit.ly/4bBy0vW

#blacklivesmatter #whitehouse #washington #usa #news</article>

items.title: LIVE: Liverpool press conference ahead of Champions League match vs PSG
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>Watch live as Liverpool holds a press conference ahead of the soccer club’s Champions League round of 16 match against Paris Saint-Germain.

#liverpool #championsleague #sports #live</article>

items.title: Zelenskyy arrives in Saudi Arabia to meet prince ahead of talks with US
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelenskyy arrived Monday in Saudi Arabia for a visit with its powerful Crown Prince ahead of his team's meeting with America's top diplomat. Read more: https://bit.ly/4kD6u5q 

#zelenskyy #ukraine #saudiarabia #trump

items.title: LIVE: Roberta Flack’s memorial service in New York
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>Watch live as Roberta Flack is eulogized at a memorial service in New York.

Flack, the Grammy-winning singer and pianist whose songs “The First Time Ever I Saw Your Face" and “Killing Me Softly with His Song" made her a global star, died last month. She was 88.

#robertaflack #live</article>

items.title: Mark Carney to replace Justin Trudeau as Canada's next prime minister
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>Canada’s next prime minister has already helped run two Group of Seven economies in crisis and now will try to steer Canada through a looming trade war brought by U.S. President Donald Trump, a threat of annexation and an expected federal election.

Former central banker Mark Carney will become prime minister after the governing Liberal Party elected him its leader Sunday in a landside vote with 85.9% support. Read more: https://bit.ly/3DkGFXc 

#canada #markcarney #trudeau #news 
Photo credit: The Canadian Press</article>

items.title: Mediterranean monk seal nursed back to health in Greece and released into the wild
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>Populations of the rare marine mammals, with their big, round eyes and prominent whiskers, had dwindled so dramatically that the species at one point faced extinction. But now thanks to conservation efforts they are enjoying a remarkable comeback. Nearly half of their estimated global population of 800 live in Greek waters. (AP Video by Thanassis Stavrakis, Elena Becatoros. Production by Thanassis Stavrakis, Elena Becatoros, Theodora Tongas).Read more: https://bit.ly/3Fgm0nH

#seals #greece #news 

Subscribe: http://smarturl.it/AssociatedPress
Read more: https://apnews.com​

This video may be available for archive licensing via https://newsroom.ap.org/home</article>

items.title: Watch as ‘Black Lives Matter’ painting near White House is dismantled
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>Construction crews are dismantling the large painting of the words 'Black Lives Matter' in Washington, D.C.. The street mural painted after the George Floyd killing is about a block from the White House. Read more: https://bit.ly/4bBy0vW

items.title: Five injured after plane crashes in Pennsylvania
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>A single-engine airplane carrying five people crashed and burst into flames Sunday in the parking lot of a retirement community near a small airport in Pennsylvania.

Everyone on board survived, officials and witnesses said.

#shorts #planecrash #pennsylvania</article>

items.title: LIVE: Senate resumes consideration of Lori Chavez-DeRemer as labor secretary
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>Watch live as the U.S. Senate resumes consideration of President Donald Trump's nomination of former Republican congresswoman Lori Chavez-DeRemer of Oregon to be secretary of Labor. 

#trump #news #live</article>

items.title: Tibetans scuffle with police outside the Chinese Embassy in India
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>Dozens of Tibetan protesters clashed with police outside the Chinese embassy in New Delhi on Monday, March 10 to mark the 66th Tibetan National Uprising Day. (AP video by Rishi lekhi and Ashwini Bhatia). Read more: https://bit.ly/4hi1XCx

#delhi #tibet #news

items.title: What to know about upcoming talks between US and Ukraine in Saudi Arabia
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>Saudi Arabia is to host talks between the United States and Ukraine in a new diplomatic push after an argument erupted during President Volodymyr Zelenskyy's Feb. 28 visit to the White House. AP journalist Jon Gambrell explains the importance of the Ukraine-U.S. talks taking place in Saudi Arabia. (AP video by Jon Gambrell, production by Annika Wolters). Read more: https://bit.ly/3DFRXVQ

#ukraine #trump #saudiarabia #news 

Subscribe: http://smarturl.it/AssociatedPress
Read more: https://apnews.com​

items.title: Trump says tariffs 'are going to make our country rich again'
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>President Donald Trump, on board Air Force One on Sunday, said tariffs "are going to be the greatest thing we've ever done as a country," and are going to make the U.S. "rich again."

#trump #donaldtrump #news
